codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: three individual offerings and four team offerings are present with pricing/description content, natural individual-to-team engagement flow is described, and the offering-card structural-marker pattern is used.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The content-worker procedure requires writing tests first and manual viewport/privacy verification, but this worker transcript only shows build/output checks and no corresponding test-file changes or interactive checks. This suggests either procedure drift in execution or a skill expectation that is not realistically enforced.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session 8638171c-73c5-4356-8772-46d2377a0778 shows Execute calls for `npm run build`, `curl .../services`, and `cat dist/services/index.html | grep -c "$"`; commit afc9c3d924700765a3e8fbcff4b6efbfb3897712 modifies only `src/pages/services.astro` (`git show --stat`).

summary: Reviewed page-services via feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff. The feature is correctly implemented and remains intact in current working state; no code defects found for the stated acceptance criteria.
